title: erigeron saxatilis
intro: Erigeron saxatilis, also known as Mountain Fleabane, is a perennial herbaceous plant species belonging to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erigeron saxatilis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
